name: Progressive_Huffman_AC_Prepare
operator_description: Prepares DCT coefficients for progressive JPEG Huffman encoding by processing AC coefficients for first scan (spectral selection) and refinement scan (successive approximation). Includes two variants: AC_first_prepare applies point transform and computes absolute values and zerobits bitmap for the first AC scan; AC_refine_prepare computes absolute values, zerobits, signbits, and EOB position for refinement scans. These preparation steps enable efficient progressive JPEG encoding.
